title: noise.best_fitness_improved v1
description: Emitted whenever a new all-time best fitness is recorded for the noise kernel within an autobench run. Source: /autobench/noise_kernel.

generation.description: Generation at which the new best was recorded.

best_fitness.description: New all-time best fitness score for this run.

improvement_delta.description: Absolute improvement over the previous all-time best (new - old). Always > 0.

island_id.description: Island that produced the new best program.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the improvement was detected.
